name: RAMLA JATOI
greetingText: I really like your name btw!
wishText: Happy Birthday! Mubarak ho, aap zindagi ke ek aur saal zinda bach gaye hain. Party kahan hai?;)
text1: Happy Birthday! Chalo mubarak ho, ek aur saal zinda rehne ke liye. Wese treat kab de rahe ho? Zyada emotional baatein aati nahi mujhe, bas khush raho:D
textInChatBox: Happy birthday to you Ramla !! Yeee! Many many happy blah...
text2: That's what I was going to do.
text4: I realised, I wanted to do something
outroText: Okay, now come back and tell me if you liked it.
replayText: Or click, if you want to watch it again.
